name: songbird-collection
description: A custom marketplace of Claude Code plugins for both experienced developers and vibe coders, extending Claude Code with workflows, commands, and integrations that fit how you actually build.

plugins.name: kairoi
plugins.description: Keeps Claude from making risky changes when working in code you don't know well. Warns before touching anything sensitive, tracks what changed during a session, and recaps long sessions so Claude doesn't lose the thread.

plugins.name: rulesense
plugins.description: Helps you write Claude instructions that actually work. Primer drops a curated starter rules file into any project so Claude stays aware of its own instruction files. Audit checks your existing rules for anything vague or ambiguous and suggests clearer rewrites. Forge writes new rules from scratch with live scoring. File cleans up formatting.

plugins.name: iceberg
plugins.description: Turns your team's coding rules into automatic errors that get caught while writing code, not after. Works with TypeScript, Python, Rust, JVM, .NET, and Go. Use it to enforce rules while coding, check an existing project for violations, or set up rules in a new one.

plugins.name: scriptorium
plugins.description: Helps Claude write the instruction files Claude Code uses — skills, CLAUDE.md, agents, and slash commands. The scribe skill covers every format Claude Code accepts. The proofreader agent checks drafts before anything goes live.

plugins.name: jetbrains-router
plugins.description: Makes Claude read and edit files through your JetBrains IDE rather than directly from disk. This gives Claude your IDE's error detection, smarter file searches, and visibility into changes you haven't saved yet. Still works if the IDE isn't running. Requires JetBrains 2025.2+ with MCP Server enabled.

plugins.name: forge
plugins.description: Plans a feature thoroughly before writing any code. Multiple reviewers examine your idea from different angles, then a final check tests the plan against your actual project. You approve before anything gets built.
